notes: Same story as the others. Can only play in a window, and the setup screen shows some options with black text on a black background. Other than that it is playable. Worked with both keyboard and controller.
title: Super Panda Adventures

notes: Game settings launches a separate executable, and that's a little glitchy. Graphics were really glitchy running fullscreen on a 4k monitor, but worked fine in windowed mode or at a lower resolution. Otherwise played the whole thing through without issues.
title: Super Panda Adventures
